tracks.rawText: 4:27Quetzal Rhythmv5.5Epic cinematic psytrance track at 145 BPM with powerful prehispanic Mexican tribal influences, Highly rhythmic, hypnotic and energetic with long, evolving and emotional loops that build intensity over time, Dominant and expressive ancient prehispanic flutes like quena and ocarina, with powerful melodic leads, fast arpeggios, call-and-response phrases and rich layered harmonies, Deep rolling psytrance bassline and punchy kick driving the track forward, Strong tribal percussion including huehuetl and teponaztli with complex rhythmic patterns, Add cinematic choir elements with wide, atmospheric, emotional and epic vocal layers, creating a sacred and transcendental feeling, Rich psychedelic sound design with delays, reverbs and spatial movement, Jungle ambience, wind, mystical textures and ritual chanting elements, The track should feel like a massive ancient ceremony turned into a cinematic experience, magical, epic, spiritual, hypnotic and full of energy, with powerful emotionalPublishRemix
tracks.title: Quetzal Rhythm

tracks.rawText: 7:59Vinyl Thunderv5.5Psychedelic rock with metal edge: dreamy analog synth pads, vinyl crackle, distant feedback, and slow-burning fuzz guitar leads, Hypnotic female vocals sit in lush reverb and delay, with soaring chorus layers, Thick bass, tom-heavy drums, phased arpeggios, and cosmic wah-soaked solos drive a mystical, heavy, expansive texturePublishRemix

tracks.rawText: 2:48Brass Confrontationv5.5Dark symphonic merengue-salsa at 120 BPM with blazing brass hits, tumbao bass, congas, bongos, timbales, güira, and cascara patterns driving the groove, String sections and French horns add tension, with dramatic minor-key piano montunos, sharp trombone stabs, choir pads, and roomy orchestral percussion for a tense, confrontational finishPublishRemix

tracks.rawText: 7:59Rattling Teacupv5.5Psychedelic solo guitar showcase with virtuosic lead work: rapid legato runs, tapped harmonics, wide vibrato, and wah-pedal bends over a hazy drone, Fuzzed amps, reverse delay, tape echo, and phaser create a tripped-out texture, while the chorus opens into crowd-chantable unison hooks and gang vocals over driving drums3PublishRemix
tracks.title: Rattling Teacup
